base_url.description: Your Confluence Cloud site origin, without the /wiki/api/v2 path (e.g. https://mysite.atlassian.net). The bundle paths include /wiki/api/v2 so relative _links.next pagination follows the same host correctly.

email.description: Atlassian account email used as the HTTP Basic auth username.

api_token.description: Atlassian API token, used as the HTTP Basic auth password. Never logged.

custom_content_type.description: Confluence custom-content type key to sync via the custom_content stream. GET /custom-content requires a type filter (Confluence has no type-agnostic custom-content list); set this to the app-defined type key you want to read (e.g. a Forge/Connect app's registered custom content type).

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
